title: The Jenkins Box-Jenkins Methodology for ARIMA Modeling
description: A flowchart illustrating the iterative three-stage model-building process proposed by Gwilym M. Jenkins for identifying, estimating, and diagnosing Autoregressive Integrated Moving Average (ARIMA) models.
relationships: Iterative process flows sequentially from Identification to Estimation to Checking
Feedback loop from Diagnostic Checking back to Identification if model is inadequate
Process exits to forecasting only when model passes diagnostic checks
